steps.title: Read signs from the line
steps.content: The line of best fit crosses the $y$-axis above the origin, so the intercept is positive. It also rises from left to right, so the slope is positive.

steps.title: Use the choices as a shortcut
steps.content: The equations differ only by the signs of the intercept and slope. Choices C and D have negative intercepts, so they cross the $y$-axis below the origin. Choices B and D have negative slopes, so they fall from left to right.

steps.title: Confirm the model
steps.content: Choice A, $y=2.8+1.7x$, has both required features: positive $y$-intercept and positive slope. Therefore choice A is correct.
